name: vscrot
title: VScrot
description: An extension to take and manage screenshots
author: JaINTP

commands.name: area
commands.title: Capture Area
commands.subtitle: Capture a selected area of your screen.
commands.description: Capture a selected area of your screen.

commands.name: manage-tools
commands.title: Manage Tools
commands.subtitle: Check and install screenshot tools
commands.description: View which capture, annotation, and clipboard tools are installed and copy install commands for any that are missing

preferences.name: screenshot_tool
preferences.title: Screenshot Tool
preferences.description: The tool used to capture screenshots. 'Auto-detect' picks the first available one.

preferences.name: annotation_tool
preferences.title: Annotation Tool
preferences.description: Tool used to annotate screenshots. Auto-reload tools (Satty, swappy) reload the preview automatically. Manual tools (GIMP, Pinta, Paint) require you to save and use Refresh Preview.

preferences.name: use_editor
preferences.title: Use Editor (Satty)
preferences.label: Open in editor by default
preferences.description: Whether to open Satty after taking a screenshot

preferences.name: copy_to_clipboard
preferences.title: Copy to Clipboard
preferences.label: Copy to clipboard automatically
preferences.description: Whether to copy the screenshot to the clipboard

preferences.name: save_to_file
preferences.title: Save to File
preferences.label: Save to file automatically
preferences.description: Whether to save the screenshot to a file

preferences.name: subfolder_format
preferences.title: Subfolder Format
preferences.description: Folder name format (e.g. %d-%m-%Y). Omit to save directly in screenshot path.

preferences.name: autoclose_vicinae
preferences.title: Autoclose Vicinae
preferences.label: Close Vicinae after saving or copying
preferences.description: Automatically close Vicinae after saving a screenshot to file or copying it to the clipboard
